# Andrés Suárez - Portfolio & Documentation

Welcome to the digital portfolio of Andrés Suárez, a Senior Full-Stack Engineer specializing in Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS cloud architecture.

## Site Structure
- `/` : The home page, featuring an introduction, timeline, and professional summary.
- `/projects` : A comprehensive list of projects, both open-source and professional.
- `/oss` : Details focused specifically on open-source contributions.
- `/blog` : Articles and blog posts.
- `/contact` : Links to connect via email, LinkedIn, or GitHub.

## AI Agent Integration (WebMCP)
This site implements the **Web Model Context Protocol (WebMCP)**.
If you are operating in a compatible browser (where `navigator.modelContext` is available), this site explicitly exposes tools that you can use to interact intelligently with the page.

Currently exposed tools:
- `navigate_to_page(path: string)`: Programmatically navigate the user to any of the primary sections (`/`, `/projects`, `/contact`, etc.).
- `get_contact_info()`: Retrieve structured contact details.

Otherwise, you can easily parse the raw text on this website or reach out via:
- GitHub: https://github.com/andresfelipe9619
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/andresfelipe9619
